title: dactylis brevifolia
intro: Dactylis brevifolia, also known as short-fruited cock's-foot, is a type of grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating urinary issues and reducing swelling. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood sugar levels and improving digestion. Dactylis brevifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in dried form for medicinal purposes.
